forms.label: Official Fannie Mae / Freddie Mac URLA (2021)
forms.description: The actual Fannie Mae Form 1003 / Freddie Mac Form 65, effective 1/2021. 9 pages, 465 fillable AcroForm fields. Indistinguishable from a real lender submission. Best for realistic AI testing.
forms.best_for: AI extraction testing that needs realistic, lender-quality documents

forms.label: Custom Rendered 1003 (Structured Layout)
forms.description: A programmatically generated Form 1003 with a clean, structured layout. All 9 sections present. Easier to read programmatically. Includes a computed ground-truth summary panel not present on the official form.
forms.best_for: Cases where a clean layout and computed summary panel are needed, or when no official template is available

use_official_when: Testing AI document classification or extraction realism
Generating data that must look like real lender submissions
User does not specify — official is the default
use_custom_when: User explicitly asks for custom or generated format
User wants the computed ground-truth summary panel visible in the PDF
A different official template has been added and selected instead
User says 'your format' or 'the generated one'
